duplicate_research_check: The transition-direction question does not duplicate trend or regime-transition ideas.
falsifiability_assessment: Magnitude-matched upward and downward transition groups provide a clear comparison.
data_readiness_assessment: Realized-volatility transitions can be derived from approved Development bars.
leakage_and_overfit_risks: Overlapping volatility windows require conservative interpretation.
transaction_cost_challenge: High-volatility transitions could imply adverse fills in a future executable study.
strongest_counterevidence: Any directional asymmetry may vanish after matching shock magnitude and prevailing trend.
alternative_explanations: Liquidation clustering may be pair-specific rather than a general transition mechanism.
score_adjustments: Keep robustness relevance high but apply the medium compute penalty.
